feature: Settings quick fixes - button spacing and edit profile fields

prompts.description: Add gap between Back to Plan and Reset & Start Over buttons in settings
prompts.prompt: In components/settings-screen.tsx, find the top navigation area where the 'Back to Plan' button and 'Reset & Start Over' button are rendered side by side. Add a gap between them — use gap-3 or gap-4 on the parent flex container, or add mr-3 to the first button. Do not change anything else.

prompts.description: Add Diet Type and Meals Per Day to Edit Profile section in settings
prompts.prompt:
In components/settings-screen.tsx, find the Edit Profile section (the form where users can update their body stats). Before making any changes, read both components/settings-screen.tsx and the Zustand store file (likely store/meal-store.ts or similar — find it with grep) to identify the exact field names for diet type and meals per day in the UserProfile type.

Then add two fields to the Edit Profile form:
1. Diet Type — a Select dropdown. Read components/onboarding.tsx to find the exact diet options array used there and reuse the same values. Map to the correct UserProfile field.
2. Meals Per Day — a row of 3 toggle buttons: 3, 4, 5. Map to the correct UserProfile field.

Place both fields after the existing body/activity inputs, before the Save button. On save, include these fields in the setUserProfile call alongside the existing fields. Use existing Tailwind classes and shadcn/ui Select component. No hardcoded hex values.
